revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十八]][[zh:二月十八]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 18|qq=February 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 18''' is the 18th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|en|Jōgen (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1194389|lt=Chōgen|1=Jōgen (Kamakura period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1207|en|1207|qid=Q5232|lt=1207|1=1207}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} exiled {{ill|Hōnen|en|Hōnen|qid=Q507980|lt=Hōnen|1=Hōnen}} to {{ill|Tosa Province|ja|土佐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tosa Province|1=Q10927605|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10927605}} and {{ill|Shinran|en|Shinran|qid=Q512934|lt=Shinran|1=Shinran}} to {{ill|Sado|en|Sado|qid=Q229064|lt=Sado Province|1=Sado}}, banning the exclusive practice of the nenbutsu; {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}. * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunna|1=Bunji (era)}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1352|en|1352|qid=Q6112|lt=1352|1=1352}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}}) – {{ill|Nitta Yoshimune|en|Nitta Yoshimune|qid=Q3342232|lt=Nitta Yoshimune|1=Nitta Yoshimune}} raised an army in {{ill|Kōzuke Province|en|Kōzuke Province|qid=Q1054838|lt=Ueno Province|1=Kōzuke Province}} and marched into Kamakura. * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1368|en|1368|qid=Q6207|lt=1368|1=1368}} {{ill|March 7|en|March 7|qid=Q2394|lt=March 7|1=March 7}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Jōji|en|Jōji|qid=Q1146153|lt=Teiji|1=Jōji}} to {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1796|en|1796|qid=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – {{ill|Inamura Sanpaku|ja|稲村三伯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inamura Sanpaku|1=Inamura Sanpaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6530548}} and others published the Dutch–French dictionary—the {{ill|Haruma Wakai|ja|ハルマ和解|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haruma Wakai|1=Halma Wage|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11326895}}—translated from the work of a Dutch book dealer. == Births == * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|qid=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku|1=Kenryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1212|en|1212|qid=Q5255|lt=1212|1=1212}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Horikawa|en|Emperor Go-Horikawa|qid=Q357221|lt=Later Horikawa Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Horikawa}}, the 86th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1234|en|1234|qid=Q5424|lt=1234|1=1234}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}}) – {{ill|Asabuki Eiji|ja|朝吹英二|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asabuki Eiji|1=Asabuki Eiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11517356}}, a businessperson (died {{ill|1918|en|1918|qid=Q2094|lt=1918|1=1918}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}}) – {{ill|Takamura Kōun|en|Takamura Kōun|qid=Q2080344|lt=Takamura Kōun|1=Takamura Kōun}}, a sculptor (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|qid=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – {{ill|Ogawa Imosen|ja|小川芋銭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ogawa Imosen|1=Ogawa Mokichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3349764}}, a Japanese painter (died {{ill|1938|en|1938|qid=Q18645|lt=1938|1=1938}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|729|en|729|qid=Q23561|lt=729|1=729}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Prince Nagaya|en|Prince Nagaya|qid=Q1963492|lt=Nagayao|1=Prince Nagaya}}, a member of the imperial family (from {{ill|684|en|684|qid=Q31128|lt=684|1=684}} onward). * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|991|en|991|qid=Q24097|lt=991|1=991}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}}) – {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|qid=Q374104|lt=Enyū Tennō|1=Emperor En'yū}}, the 64th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (from {{ill|959|en|959|qid=Q23750|lt=959|1=959}} onward). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|17|2|19|1|18|3|2|0218|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
